title: Michael Dobson (rugby league)
extract: Michael Dobson (born 29 May 1986) is an Australian former professional rugby league footballer. He previously played for Australian NRL clubs Canberra Raiders and Newcastle Knights, and European Super League clubs Catalans Dragons, Wigan Warriors, Hull Kingston Rovers and Salford Red Devils. He primarily played as a halfback or five-eighth. In 2009, he won the Albert Goldthorpe Medal.
